changes: Moved TypeScript knowledge code from src/knowledge to packages/knowledge/src.
Moved agent code, templates, schemas, context manifest, and worker context files from src/agents to packages/agents/src.
Updated package exports and TypeScript path aliases for @decomp-orchestrator/knowledge and @decomp-orchestrator/agents.
Updated CLI, dashboard server, and tests to consume agents and knowledge through workspace package imports.
Updated knowledge package path helpers to resolve the repository root from the new packages/knowledge/src depth.
Updated agent runtime and context helpers to resolve repository-root paths from the new packages/agents/src depth.
Updated agent context manifest paths from src/agents/... to packages/agents/src/...
Updated PR-review and knowledge-curator schema paths to packages/agents/src/...

cycle_break.previous_cycle: src/knowledge/resources.ts imported src/agents/context.ts while agents imported knowledge resource APIs.
cycle_break.resolution: packages/knowledge/src/resources.ts accepts agentContext and scripts from callers; packages/agents selects agent context and passes it into resourceMap.
cycle_break.result: packages/agents depends on packages/knowledge and packages/core; packages/knowledge depends only on packages/core.

commands.summary: Workspace install reported no changes after agents/knowledge export updates.
Root TypeScript check passed after moving agents and knowledge packages.
Root smoke passed, including rendered prompt path assertions for packages/agents/src context files.
Knowledge command smoke listed registered sources and tools from the moved package.
Root CLI compatibility help still printed usage after moved package imports.
